Off Calendar Nov-15-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Kevin P. Greenquist, Esq., appeared for Defendant & moving party: All Hollows Gardens Apartments, LP
Jon Rodriguez, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & opposing party: Helen Jackson

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendants All Hallows Gardens Apartments, LP, AIMCO CAPITAL, INC., NHPMN MANAGEMENT, LLC's Motion For Protective Order is denied. Defendants' objections to the declaration of Eric Lifschitz are sustained. Defendants are ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
